questionHtml:
How are the uncertainties of two quantities combined when the quantities are multiplied together?

A.     Uncertainties are added.

B.     % uncertainties are multiplied.

C.     Uncertainties are multiplied.

D.     % uncertainties are added.

meta.title: How are the uncertainties of two quantities combined when the quantities are multiplied together? A. Uncertainties are added. B. % uncertainties are multiplied. C. Uncertainties ar
breadcrumbLabels: 11.1 Uncertainties and errors in measurement and results
